narrative:
Precinct Maumee 6 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,218 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.6 percentage points.
